hero.title: Intelligent Reports with
hero.subtitle: Connect your database, generate SQL with local AI via Ollama and visualize everything with Power BI Embedded. Full privacy - your data never leaves your machine.

features.title: Complete
features.subtitle: Everything you need to transform data into actionable insights

multiDb.title: Multi-Database Connection
multiDb.desc: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Oracle with secure credential encryption.

sqlAI.title: Automatic SQL with AI
sqlAI.desc: Describe in natural language, Ollama generates optimized SQL locally.

execute.title: Direct Execution
execute.desc: Execute generated queries directly on your database.

powerBI.title: Power BI Embedded
powerBI.desc: Visualize interactive dashboards directly in the system.

history.title: Full History
history.desc: Access all generated SQL queries with option to re-execute.

exportResults.title: Export Results
exportResults.desc: Export data to CSV, Excel or JSON with one click.

encryption.title: Secure Encryption
encryption.desc: Passwords encrypted with AES-GCM and unique key per user.

reports.title: Intelligent Reports
reports.desc: Automatic report creation based on your data.

secureQueries.title: Secure Queries
secureQueries.desc: SELECT only allowed, protection against SQL injection.

analyticsChat.title: Analytics Chat
analyticsChat.desc: Chat with AI about data, SQL and Power BI.

rerun.title: Re-run Queries
rerun.desc: Re-execute any query from history in seconds.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant
multiTenant.desc: Each user with their own data and connections.

api.title: Public API
api.desc: Integrate InsightFlow with other systems via API.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Complete protection of your data with industry best practices

sanitization.title: Input Sanitization
sanitization.desc: All inputs are validated and sanitized to prevent malicious injections.

attackProtection.title: Attack Protection
attackProtection.desc: SQL injection, XSS and CSRF blocking with multiple layers of defense.

middleware.title: Security Middleware
middleware.desc: Dedicated middleware removes sensitive data from any response.

secureLogs.title: Secure Logs
secureLogs.desc: Logs contain no confidential information, credentials or stack traces.

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.desc: Protection against brute force and abuse with request limits.

zeroExposure.title: Zero Exposure
zeroExposure.desc: We never return connection strings, credentials or raw SQL.

authSection.title: Robust
authSection.subtitle: Complete authentication system with manual user approval.

secureRegister.title: Secure Registration
secureRegister.desc: Sign up with email and password with full validation.

protectedLogin.title: Protected Login
protectedLogin.desc: Authentication with JWT tokens and automatic refresh.

manualApproval.title: Manual Approval
manualApproval.desc: New users are approved by administrators.

routeProtection.title: Route Protection
routeProtection.desc: Middleware that validates JWT and user status.

pwa.title: Install as a
pwa.subtitle: Native app experience directly from the browser, no app stores needed

easyInstall.title: Easy Install
easyInstall.desc: Install as a native app on any device

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.desc: Access cached data even without internet

ollama.title: Artificial Intelligence
ollama.subtitle: The full power of modern LLMs running on your machine - private, fast and no per-token cost
ollama.ctaSubtitle: Install Ollama, download a model and connect to InsightFlow

sqlGen.title: SQL Generation
sqlGen.desc: Describe what you need and Ollama generates optimized SQL locally.

execute.title: Direct Execution
execute.desc: Execute the generated query directly on your connected database.

viewResults.title: Results Viewer
viewResults.desc: See results in a table with preview of up to 100 records.

flexExport.title: Flexible Export
flexExport.desc: Export results to CSV, Excel or JSON instantly.

dataAnalysis.title: Data Analysis
dataAnalysis.desc: Automatic identification of patterns, trends and anomalies in your data.

private.title: 100% Private
private.desc: Your data never leaves your machine. Local AI via Ollama - no external API keys.

multiModel.title: Multi-Model
multiModel.desc: Choose between Llama 3, Mistral, CodeLlama, Phi-3 and any Ollama model.

continuousChat.title: Continuous Chat
continuousChat.desc: Analytics chat with context memory for more precise iterations.

noLatency.title: No Network Latency
noLatency.desc: Faster responses since AI runs directly on your local CPU/GPU.

offlineWork.title: Works Offline
offlineWork.desc: Work without internet - Ollama runs completely on your machine.

executiveSummary.title: Executive Summary
executiveSummary.desc: Summarized reports ready for presentations generated locally.

gpuAccel.title: GPU Accelerated
gpuAccel.desc: Leverage your NVIDIA/AMD GPU for ultra-fast inference with Ollama.

gemini.title: Cutting-Edge
gemini.subtitle: Transform natural language into powerful insights with Gemini

plans.title: Choose the
plans.subtitle: Start transforming data into insights right now. Cancel anytime.

footer.tagline: Transform your data into actionable insights with the power of Ollama (local AI) and Power BI visualization.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create your account to get started

pendingApproval.title: Awaiting Approval
pendingApproval.message: Your account is pending approval. You will receive an email once an administrator approves your registration.

rejected.title: Access Denied
rejected.message: Your access request was rejected. Please contact the administrator for more information.

errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

success.registeredMessage: Your account is awaiting approval. You will receive an email when approved.
success.emailSentMessage: Check your inbox to reset your password.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Welcome to InsightFlow. Here is a summary of your activity.

reports.title: Generate Report
reports.subtitle: Describe in natural language what you need

settings.title: Settings
settings.ollamaConfigDesc: Configure the URL and default model of local Ollama

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: Oops! The page you are looking for does not exist.
